test_eip712Domain_multipleProxies_differ.details: Confirms each proxy correctly returns its own address.

test_eip712Domain_verifyingContract_equa.details: This confirms that when eip712Domain() is called through the Diamond proxy,      address(this) in the facet code evaluates to the proxy address, not the facet.

testFuzz_eip712Domain_verifyingContract_.notice: Fuzz test: verifyingContract always equals proxy regardless of chainId.

test_eip712Domain_allFieldsCorrect_throu.notice: Verify all eip712Domain fields are correctly returned through proxy.

test_eip712Domain_chainId_dynamicThrough.notice: Verify chainId is dynamically read through proxy.

test_eip712Domain_consistentAcrossCalls_.notice: Verify consistency across multiple calls through proxy.

test_eip712Domain_multipleProxies_differ.notice: Multiple proxies with same facet should have different verifyingContract.

test_eip712Domain_verifyingContract_equa.notice: CRANE-065: Core test - verifyingContract must equal proxy address.
